# HXiao.ai

HXiao.ai is an editorial-minimal website by Hongyu Xiao focused on AI, Agentic AI, Seismology, Research, and Science.

## Primary Topics
- AI
- Agentic AI
- Seismology
- Research
- Science

## Key URLs
- Home: https://hy-x.github.io/HXiao.ai/
- About: https://hy-x.github.io/HXiao.ai/about.html
- Article: https://hy-x.github.io/HXiao.ai/article.html

## Content Guidance
- Long-form, reading-first essays.
- Focus on technical clarity and research context.
- Prefer citing uncertainty and limitations where relevant.
